query:
CREATE TABLE performance_reviews (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employeeId INT NOT NULL,
  employeeName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  employeeRole VARCHAR(255),
  department VARCHAR(100),
  reviewPeriod VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  reviewType ENUM('annual', 'quarterly', 'probationary', 'project') DEFAULT 'annual' NOT NULL,
  reviewCycle ENUM('mid_year', 'year_end', 'quarterly') DEFAULT 'year_end' NOT NULL,
  reviewerId INT,
  reviewerName VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('draft', 'self_assessment', 'manager_review', 'calibration', 'completed', 'acknowledged') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  selfPerformanceRating INT,
  selfAccomplishments TEXT,
  selfChallenges TEXT,
  selfDevelopmentAreas TEXT,
  selfGoalsProgress TEXT,
  managerPerformanceRating INT,
  managerFeedback TEXT,
  managerStrengths TEXT,
  managerImprovementAreas TEXT,
  qualityOfWork INT,
  productivity INT,
  communication INT,
  teamwork INT,
  initiative INT,
  reliability INT,
  adaptability INT,
  leadership INT,
  overallRating INT,
  ratingJustification TEXT,
  promotionRecommendation ENUM('not_ready', 'developing', 'ready', 'highly_recommended'),
  nextPeriodGoals TEXT,
  developmentPlan TEXT,
  trainingNeeds TEXT,
  employeeAcknowledged BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  employeeAcknowledgedAt TIMESTAMP,
  employeeComments TEXT,
  reviewDueDate TIMESTAMP,
  selfAssessmentDueDate TIMESTAMP,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE performance_reviews (

  reviewerId INT,
  reviewerName VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('draft', 'self_assessment', 'manager_review', 'calibration', 'completed', 'acknowledged') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  selfPerformanceRating INT,
  selfAccomplishments TEXT,
  selfChallenges TEXT,
  selfDevelopmentAreas TEXT,
  selfGoalsProgress TEXT,
  managerPerformanceRating INT,
  managerFeedback TEXT,
  managerStrengths TEXT,
  managerImprovementAreas TEXT,
  qualityOfWork INT,
  productivity INT,
  communication INT,
  teamwork INT,
  initiative INT,
  reliability INT,
  adaptability INT,
  leadership INT,
  overallRating INT,
  ratingJustification TEXT,
  promotionRecommendation ENUM('not_ready', 'developing', 'ready', 'highly_recommended'),
  nextPeriodGoals TEXT,
  developmentPlan TEXT,
  trainingNeeds TEXT,
  employeeAcknowledged BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  employeeAcknowledgedAt TIMESTAMP,
  employeeComments TEXT,
  reviewDueDate TIMESTAMP,
  selfAssessmentDueDate TIMESTAMP,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP,

  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
